title: Fix premature Agent Factory AI draft timeout
summary: Extended backend suggestion polling and frontend request timeout to prevent early 504 errors while OpenClaw is still generating valid output.
changes: Increased suggest route polling attempts and interval.
Parsed suggestion opportunistically during polling loop until valid JSON appears.
Raised AI Draft client timeout to 30 seconds.
Validated successful suggest response on Pi runtime.
risks: Longer waits before error response when OpenClaw is truly unresponsive.
rollback: Restore previous shorter polling and 12s frontend timeout.
